title: Memorandum of understanding between DfT and Swiss Confederation: direct international rail connection
body: "Memorandum of understanding (MoU) stating the roles and responsibilities in developing a direct international rail connection between the UK and Switzerland involving the:   Department for Transport (DfT) Federal Department of the Environment, Transport, Energy and Communications of the Swiss Confederation   This MoU is a joint commitment to formalise government cooperation to explore the potential for a direct rail service between the UK and Switzerland. This will include a joint working group that will bring together both governments and industry experts to address any potential barriers and look at solutions for establishing these direct connections.  "
